title: Purnea University Admit Card 2026 - Overview

detail.title: Purnea University Admit Card 2026 - Overview
detail.short_info: Purnea University Admit Card 2026 released for UG semester and end‑semester exams. Check release date, exam details, how to download Purnea University hall ticket, direct admit card link, and important instructions.

content.text: Purnea University Admit Card 2026 has been released online for Undergraduate (UG) semester and end‑semester examinations, and students can download their hall tickets from the official portal using their registration or roll number.

Purnea University, Bihar issues the Purnea University Admit Card 2026 for BA, BSc, BCom and other UG examinations through its official website and dedicated examination portal. The admit card is compulsory for appearing in the exam and works as your primary identity proof inside the examination hall. Students must download, print, and verify all details on the hall ticket well before the exam date to avoid last‑minute issues.

sections.heading: Key Highlights of Purnea University Admit Card 2026

rows: BA, BSc, BCom and other Undergraduate programmes
Registration number / roll number / user ID and password

sections.heading: Purnea University Admit Card 2026 Release and Exams Covered

content.text: Purnea University releases admit cards online a few days before the commencement of each semester or end‑semester examination. Different semesters or parts (Part‑I, Part‑II, Part‑III, Semester‑1, Semester‑2, etc.) may have separate admit card release dates, which are notified through the examination notice section on the university website. Students should regularly check the site and their college notices for updated schedules.
The 2026 admit cards generally cover:

items: UG end‑semester exams for BA, BSc, BCom and allied courses.
CBCS semester‑wise exams (such as UG 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 6th semester) for ongoing batches.
Yearly pattern exams like Graduation Part‑III and other notified programmes, depending on the university’s exam calendar.

sections.heading: Important Dates for Purnea University Admit Card 2026

items: Admit card release date (UG end‑semester 2026): Purnea University has released the admit cards for Undergraduate (UG) end‑semester examinations 2026 on 26 March 2026 (around the time the public notice was issued).

UG end‑semester exam start date (BA, BSc, BCom, 1st semester, session 2025-29): The revised schedule states that UG first semester (December 2025 session, 2025-29 batch) examinations will start from 30 March 2026.
UG end‑semester exam period (1st semester December 2025 exams): Local news reports indicate that the UG first semester December 2025 examinations will be held from 30 March 2026 to 15 April 2026.

sections.heading: Eligibility to Download Purnea University Admit Card 2026

content.text: Not every student can automatically download the admit card; a few basic conditions apply.
Who Can Download the Admit Card?

items: Students enrolled in Purnea University or its affiliated colleges in the respective programme and academic session.
Candidates who have correctly filled the exam form for their semester/part and whose forms have been accepted by their college and the university.

content.text: Pre‑Conditions Before Admit Card Download

items: Submission of the exam form within the deadline.
Payment of prescribed examination fees and clearance of dues (if any).
Verification and approval of the exam form by the college or examination department.

content.text: If any of these steps are incomplete, the admit card may not be visible on the portal.

sections.heading: How to Download Purnea University Admit Card 2026

content.text: This is the most important, action‑oriented section for students searching “Purnea University admit card 2026 kaise download kare”.
Direct Links

items: University Website: Click Here
Admit Card Direct Link: Click Here

content.text: You can place both links near the top of your article to improve click‑through rate and user experience.
Step‑by‑Step Guide to Download the Admit Card

items: Open the official website of Purnea University (https://purneau.ac.in) in your browser.
Go to the “Examination” or “Student Corner” section and click on the latest “Admit Card” or “Download Admit Card” link for your course/semester.
You will be redirected to the admit card portal (examinationpup.in) or a dedicated student login page.
Select your course (BA/BSc/BCom), semester/part and college, if those options appear on the page.
Enter your registration number, roll number, or user ID along with your password/date of birth (as asked on the form).
Click on the “Search”, “Login” or “Submit” button to fetch your hall ticket.
Your Purnea University Admit Card 2026 will appear on the screen with all your exam details.
Download the admit card in PDF format and take one or more clear printouts on A4 paper. Keep one copy for backup in case the first one gets damaged.

content.text: If the page does not open, shows an error, or your details are not found, wait for some time and try again or contact your college examination in‑charge.

sections.heading: Details Printed on Purnea University Admit Card 2026

content.text: Students should carefully check the information printed on the admit card and get any mistakes corrected before the examination.
Common details include:

items: Student’s name, photograph, and signature.
Father’s name and mother’s name.
Registration number, roll number, and course name (BA/BSc/BCom etc.).
College name, code, and exam session/semester (e.g., UG 1st Semester 2025‑29).
List of subjects/papers with paper code, paper name, and exam date.
Examination centre name, code, and full address.
Reporting time, exam duration, and shift (morning/afternoon/evening).
Important instructions and rules for candidates.

content.text: If you notice incorrect spellings, wrong subjects, or a wrong exam centre, immediately inform your college or the university examination department.
Purnea University strictly enforces exam rules, and violation can lead to cancellation of the paper. Your article should highlight the key instructions to add value for students.
What to Carry to the Exam Centre

items: A clear, printed copy of the Purnea University Admit Card 2026.
A valid photo identity proof, such as Aadhaar card, voter ID, driving licence, or college ID (if asked by the invigilator).
Necessary stationery items - pens, pencils, eraser, and any other items allowed by the university.

content.text: What Not to Carry

items: Mobile phones, smart watches, earphones, Bluetooth devices, or any electronic gadgets inside the examination hall.
Books, written notes, chits, or any form of study material.
Any item considered unfair under university examination rules.

content.text: General Exam Rules

items: Reach the exam centre at least 30 minutes before reporting time mentioned on the admit card.
Sit only on the seat allotted to you as per the seating chart.
Follow all instructions given by invigilators; any kind of malpractice may lead to debarment from the exam.

sections.heading: Purnea University Admit Card 2026 - Official Links and Support
